case_matrix.name: deterministic-bytes
case_matrix.note: `deterministic-bytes` is ordinary non-planted data and is expected to bloat at seed depth 1.

case_matrix.name: planted-sha256-arity2
case_matrix.note: `planted-sha256-arity2` repeats `SHA256([0x00])[0..4]` spans; it proves v1 can produce negative delta when short seeds are deliberately present.

case_matrix.name: streaming-planted-span4-control
case_matrix.note: `streaming-planted-span4-control` plants arity-1 generated 4-byte spans; v2 seed-span records are 5 bytes, so these hits are intentionally not emitted.

case_matrix.name: indexed-planted-span8
case_matrix.note: `indexed-planted-span8` builds an exact-prefix index and uses `.tlmr` v2 indexed lookup on planted 8-byte spans.

case_matrix.name: streaming-planted-span8
case_matrix.note: `streaming-planted-span8` uses the CPU stratified target-span streaming matcher on the same planted 8-byte corpus.

case_matrix.name: streaming-planted-span12
case_matrix.note: `streaming-planted-span12` plants arity-3 generated 12-byte spans to show how longer spans amortize the fixed v2 seed-span record overhead.

case_matrix.name: streaming-random-null-1k
case_matrix.note: `streaming-random-null-1k` is a deterministic pseudorandom control; any negative delta here would need investigation.

case_matrix.name: streaming-planted-density10
case_matrix.note: `streaming-planted-density10` plants a small contiguous generated region, showing that sparse hits can still lose to container and literal overhead.

case_matrix.name: streaming-planted-density50
case_matrix.note: `streaming-planted-density50` plants a larger contiguous generated region and records the break-even direction under the same v2 overhead.

case_matrix.name: streaming-planted-offset1
case_matrix.note: `streaming-planted-offset1` shifts planted spans off the block grid to quantify the current alignment penalty.

case_matrix.name: streaming-recursive-offset-pass2
case_matrix.note: `streaming-recursive-offset-pass2` uses the same off-grid planted corpus as the alignment control; pass 1 emits a literal layer, then pass 2 compresses the shifted literal payload.

case_matrix.name: streaming-structured-json-control
case_matrix.note: `streaming-structured-json-control` is generated non-planted structured text; it is a control, not a viability claim.

case_matrix.name: kolyma-pdf-streaming-control
case_matrix.note: `kolyma-pdf-streaming-control` runs the streaming path on the symbolic `kolyma.pdf` corpus as a binary/PDF control case.
